nodes.text: Step right up! Humphrey's Emporium of Fine Salvage is open for business! I've got weapons, armour, suspicious consumables — all priced to shift before MEGACORP finds me here.
Back again! Hopefully with a bit more scrap this time. I'm not running a charity — well, I am, technically, but don't tell anyone.
BUDDY 9000 is offline?! Do you know what this means? MEGACORP's supply drones will be confused for at least a week! Stock up while you can!
